reviews.comment:
Lugar comodo si vas de paso. No tiene la cocina abierta en todo momento. El alojamiento es limpio y comodo

(Translated by Google)
A convenient place if you're just passing through. The kitchen isn't always open. The accommodation is clean and comfortable.
